basic_details.job_title: NBPGR Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: National Bureau of Plant Genetic Resources (NBPGR)
basic_details.short_information: National Bureau of Plant Genetic Resources (NBPGR) Recruitment 2026: National Bureau of Plant Genetic Resources is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 1 Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.details: Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker: Graduate degree in any discipline. Two or more years of experience in field experiments, crossing work, and data recording in germplasm collections. Basic knowledge of computer (MS Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.) is desirable.

content_sections.heading: NBPGR Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker Recruitment 2026 - Overview
NBPGR Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NBPGR Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NBPGR Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NBPGR Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker: Graduate degree in any discipline. Two or more years of experience in field experiments, crossing work, and data recording in germplasm collections. Basic knowledge of computer (MS Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.) is desirable.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for NBPGR Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: NBPGR Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NBPGR Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview, and the interview date is 30 July 2026. Candidates should report on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker post?
faq.answer: A Graduate degree in any discipline is the minimum educational qualification required for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post is 50 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 18,000/- plus 18% House Rent Allowance (HRA) per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NBPGR Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker position?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Eligible candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in-Interview. Candidates will be assessed based on their qualifications and performance during the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the Walk-in Interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be conducted at ICAR-NBPGR, Regional Station, Thrissur, Kerala, with the pincode 680656.

faq.question: Q10. What experience is desirable for the Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker post?
faq.answer: Desirable experience includes working in field experiments, crossing work, and data recording in germplasm collections, along with basic computer knowledge.
